title: Biomes O' Bark
description: TreeBark+ Addon for Biomes O' Plenty
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rVrGcXB6/images/fb3a4a675521b24febdebb902a3d80bb77693fd4.png)

[![Available on Curseforge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-bark)
[![Available on Github](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/Nico44YT/BiomesOBark)
[![Issue Tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/documentation/issues_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/Nico44YT/BiomesOBark/issues)
[![Requires TreeBark+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EyYeXJN7/images/7df112d03a8c8bc124ab1e8dacdb6512ee3689e6.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/treebark)

Biomes O' Bark is an addon for the mod [TreeBark+](https://modrinth.com/mod/treebark), that includes the support for [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) logs/wood

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rVrGcXB6/images/eb7571c3e06ee78dfbbc9c51afd38787ab5d6a04.gif)

Both [TreeBark+](https://modrinth.com/mod/treebark) and [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) are required to use this mod.

_This addon will only work for TreeBark+ versions of v3.0+_
